
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"a":[{},{},{},{},{}],"b":[{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}}],"c":[{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"d":[]},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},"path":["a",0]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},"path":["a",1]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},"path":["a",2]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},"path":["a",3]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"David"}},"path":["a",4]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
